title: mimosa hassleriana var. genuina
intro: Mimosa hassleriana var. genuina is a plant species in the Fabaceae family, commonly known as the sensitive plant due to its compound leaves that fold up when touched. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Mimosa hassleriana var. genuina are said to include reducing fever, treating wounds, and relieving digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are used to treat a variety of health conditions.
